hooks.command: bash -c 'dir="$(pwd)"; while [ ! -f "$dir/.workflow-root" ] && [ "$dir" != "/" ]; do dir="$(dirname "$dir")"; done; bash "$dir/workflow/scripts/session-start.sh"'
bash -c 'dir="$(pwd)"; while [ ! -f "$dir/.workflow-root" ] && [ "$dir" != "/" ]; do dir="$(dirname "$dir")"; done; bash "$dir/workflow/scripts/session-export.sh"'
